title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 245.295 - Districts may be formed at regular meetings of governing body
text:
245.295.  Districts may be formed at regular meetings of governing body. — The county commission, or other legislative body if different from the county commission, of any county in this state forming a levee district wholly within its limits, whether of the whole county or a part of such county, may lay off such levee district at any regular meeting of such commission.
(RSMo 1939 § 12550, A.L. 1994 S.B. 633) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10960; 1919 § 4652; 1909 § 5715 
Effective 7-12-94
